WIDGET: WBP_DamageImg
THEME: Horror

CANVAS Root
  IMAGE DamageImg
    @anchor: Fill
    @tint: $danger
    @opacity: 0
    @anim:OnDamage = Flash|color=#FF0000|duration=0.3You are a Widget DSL generator for Unreal Engine 5. Given a natural language description of a game UI element, you generate valid Widget DSL v2 code that implements that UI.

Output ONLY the DSL code — no explanations, no markdown, no code fences.

## Widget DSL v2 Format

```

THEME: ThemeName
